sections.heading: Tax ID Number
sections.body:
If your organization's billing or invoice address is outside of the
United States (USA), add your VAT (Value Added Tax) or GST (Goods and Services Tax) Number in the
**VAT/GST ID** field on the **Payment Method** or the
**Billing Profile** modal.

Atlas displays the **VAT/GST ID** field only if you select
a country other than the United States.

sections.heading: Taxation by Region
sections.body: VAT (Value Added Tax) and GST (Goods and Services Tax) vary by region. Your organization's billing address determines your region.

sections.heading: Australia
sections.body:
Atlas and [Flex Consulting](flex-consulting) charge GST (Goods and Services Tax) unless
you provide a valid `GST ID Number`. To avoid GST (Goods and Services Tax) charges, include a
valid `GST ID Number` on your [default recipients for billing alerts](atlas-billing-profile).

sections.heading: Canada
sections.body:
> **Note:** Your `GST ID Number` is your 9-digit
> [Federal Business Number](https://www.canada.ca/en/services/taxes/business-number.html),
> plus your 2-character program identifier, plus your 4-digit
> reference number.

Atlas charges GST (Goods and Services Tax) unless you provide a valid `GST ID Number`.
To avoid GST (Goods and Services Tax) charges, include a valid `GST ID Number` on your
[default recipients for billing alerts](atlas-billing-profile).

> **Important:** Some Canadian provinces charge a provincial sales tax (PST).
> Atlas always charges PST (Provincial Sales Tax), even with a valid `GST ID Number`.

sections.heading: European Union (EU)
sections.body:
Atlas and [Flex Consulting](flex-consulting) charge
VAT (Value Added Tax) unless you provide a valid `VAT ID Number`. To avoid VAT (Value Added Tax) charges,
include a valid `VAT ID Number` on your [default recipients for billing alerts](atlas-billing-profile).

> **Important:** If your billing address is in Ireland, Atlas and Flex Consulting
> always charge VAT (Value Added Tax), even with a valid `VAT ID Number`.

sections.heading: India
sections.body:
Atlas and [Flex Consulting](flex-consulting) applies GST (Goods and Services Tax) charges
to your invoice unless you provide a valid `GST ID Number`. To avoid
GST (Goods and Services Tax) charges, include a valid `GST ID Number` on your
[default recipients for billing alerts](atlas-billing-profile).

sections.heading: Isle of Man (Part of the UK terroritory for VAT purposes)
sections.body:
Atlas applies UK VAT (Value Added Tax) unless you provide a valid GB VAT (Value Added Tax)
registration number. To avoid UK VAT (Value Added Tax) charges, include a valid `VAT ID Number`
on your [default recipients for billing alerts](atlas-billing-profile).

[Flex Consulting](flex-consulting) doesn't charge VAT (Value Added Tax).

sections.heading: Kenya
sections.body: Atlas and [Flex Consulting](flex-consulting) charge VAT (Value Added Tax).

sections.heading: Malaysia
sections.body:
Atlas and [Flex Consulting](flex-consulting) charge Sales and
Service Tax (SST).

sections.heading: Norway
sections.body:
Atlas and [Flex Consulting](flex-consulting) charge VAT (Value Added Tax) unless
you provide a valid VAT (Value Added Tax) registration number. To avoid VAT (Value Added Tax) charges,
include a valid `VAT ID Number` on your [default recipients for billing alerts](atlas-billing-profile).

sections.heading: Saudi Arabia
sections.body:
Atlas and [Flex Consulting](flex-consulting) charge VAT (Value Added Tax) unless
you provide a valid `VAT ID Number`. To avoid VAT (Value Added Tax) charges, include a
valid `VAT ID Number` on your  [default recipients for billing alerts](atlas-billing-profile).

sections.heading: South Africa
sections.body:
Atlas charges VAT (Value Added Tax).

[Flex Consulting](flex-consulting) doesn't charge VAT (Value Added Tax).

sections.heading: Singapore
sections.body:
Atlas charges GST (Goods and Services Tax) unless you provide a valid `GST ID Number`.
To avoid GST (Goods and Services Tax) chartes, include a valid `GST ID Number` on your
[default recipients for billing alerts](atlas-billing-profile).

[Flex Consulting](flex-consulting) doesn't charge GST (Goods and Services Tax).

sections.heading: Switzerland
sections.body: Atlas and [Flex Consulting](flex-consulting) charge VAT (Value Added Tax).

sections.heading: United Kingdom (UK)
sections.body:
Atlas charges VAT (Value Added Tax) unless you provide a valid `VAT ID Number`.
To avoid VAT (Value Added Tax) charges, include a valid `VAT ID Number` on your
[default recipients for billing alerts](atlas-billing-profile).

[Flex Consulting](flex-consulting) doesn't charge VAT (Value Added Tax).

sections.heading: Payment Processing in India
sections.body:
If you pay with a credit card from a credit card issuer based in
India, you must complete additional payment processing
steps that comply with RBI (Reserve Bank of India) regulations.

The RBI (Reserve Bank of India) requires a *mandate* for recurring payments to ensure you
aren't charged above a certain amount each billing period. MongoDB
automatically registers a mandate for $1,400 USD (United States Dollars) each month when
you [add a payment method](add-method-payment-processing-india)
or [retry a payment](retry-payment-processing-india).

sections.heading: Mandates
sections.body:
The mandate that MongoDB registers on your behalf permits MongoDB to
charge your credit card up to $1,400 USD (United States Dollars) per month. This might be
presented by your card issuer or bank in INR (Indian Rupees) instead of USD (United States Dollars).

MongoDB charges your credit card for your usage only. The $1,400
mandate is a limit on the amount you can be charged per month.

You manage your mandates through your card issuer or bank. When you
[add a payment method](add-method-payment-processing-india) or
[retry a payment](retry-payment-processing-india) with a credit
card from a credit card issuer based in India, according to RBI (Reserve Bank of India)
regulations, your card issuer or bank provides a
link to manage your mandates.

sections.heading: Payment Statuses
sections.body:
If your credit card issuer is based in India, you might see two
additional [payment statuses](atlas/billing/invoices):

| Status            | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| ----------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| PROCESSING        | The payment is pending due to RBI (Reserve Bank of India) regulations and might require authorization.A payment might stay in the processing state for several days. During this time, according to RBI (Reserve Bank of India) regulations, your card issuer will notify you of the charge and provide a link for you to revoke your mandate. No action is required unless the payment is for more than ₹15,000 INR (Indian Rupees).If the payment is for more than ₹15,000 INR (Indian Rupees), the notification you receive from your card issuer includes a link to authorize that payment. You must authorize the payment to successfully pay, otherwise the payment fails with the FAILED status.If you revoke your mandate, attempts to charge your credit card fail until you register a new mandate. Register a mandate by adding a payment method or retrying a payment |
| PENDING\_REVERSAL | The payment is pending, but will be refunded or cancelled as soon as possible.If the payment succeeds, MongoDB refunds it. If the payment fails, MongoDB cancels it.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |

> **Important:** If you pay with a credit card from a credit card issuer based in
> India, you are charged in INR (Indian Rupees). However, the Atlas UI and
> MongoDB communications typically present prices in USD (United States Dollars).
>
> MongoDB uses the currency conversion rate at the time your payment
> moves to the `PROCESSING` status to convert between
> INR (Indian Rupees) and USD (United States Dollars).

sections.heading: Adding a Payment Method
sections.body:
When you add a credit card from a credit card issuer based in India as
your payment method, Atlas prompts you to verify your identity.
After you verify your identity, Atlas might take up to 2 minutes to
add your credit card. MongoDB registers a mandate on your behalf.

According to RBI (Reserve Bank of India) regulations, your card issuer will notify you via
SMS (short message service) that a mandate was registered on your behalf.

sections.heading: Retrying a Payment
sections.body:
When you retry a payment from the Atlas UI, MongoDB prompts you
to verify your identity and then registers a new mandate on your behalf.

According to RBI (Reserve Bank of India) regulations, your card issuer will notify you via
SMS (short message service) that a mandate was registered on your behalf.

sections.heading: Strong Customer Authentication (SCA) Changes
sections.body:
SCA (Strong Customer Authentication) is a new European regulatory requirement to reduce fraud and make
online payments more secure. All payment service providers are required
to build additional authentication into their checkout flow once SCA (Strong Customer Authentication)
goes into effect. Customers in
[European Economic Area (EEA)](https://www.efta.int/eea) might be
required to authenticate their credit cards depending on the card's
issuer, starting 14 September 2019. If your credit card issuer
requires authentication, review the following [Authentication Process](sca-auth-process)
to continue paying for MongoDB Atlas seamlessly with a credit
card.

Marketing emails will be sent out to affected customers announcing the
policy change and the steps necessary to comply with SCA (Strong Customer Authentication).

sections.heading: Authentication Process
sections.body:
The following sections cover different ways to authenticate your credit
card to comply with Strong Customer Authentication.

sections.heading: Deploy a Paid Database as a New User
sections.body:
New Atlas users who do not have a payment method saved can
authenticate a new credit card when paying for a cluster on
the **Create a Cluster** page. To learn more, see
[Cluster Types](create-new-database-deployment).

sections.heading: Edit Payment Method
sections.body:
Existing users can edit their **Payment Method** to
authenticate a new credit card or reauthenticate an existing credit
card to comply with SCA (Strong Customer Authentication):

In the Overview page, you can explore:

- Invoice information that includes a Pending Invoice section,
  which shows your Net Month-to-Date Amount for the current billing period. The
  net month-to-date amount reflects your net charges from the start of the period
  to the current day. You can also see a Last Invoice section,
  which shows your usage and amount due for the previous billing period.

- The [embedded data visualizations](billing-visualizations).

- The [subscription level](subscription-level) and
  [subscription level](subscription-level) sections.

| Field                 | Necessity   | Action                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| --------------------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Country               | Required    | Select the country for your billing address. You can also start typing the name of the country and then select it from the filtered list of countries.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| VAT ID                | Conditional | Atlas displays the VAT ID field if you select a country other than the United States.To learn more about VAT, see VAT ID.If your company's billing address is in a country other than the United States (USA), Atlas typically charges VAT (Value Added Tax) if you do not enter a valid VAT ID Number on your billing profile.IMPORTANT: If your billing address is in Ireland or certain Canadian provinces, Atlas always charges VAT (Value Added Tax), even with a valid VAT ID Number.To learn more about VAT (Value Added Tax) by region, see International Usage and Taxation.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Address Line 1        | Required    | Type the mailing address for your billing address.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Address Line 2        | Optional    | Type an additional line for the mailing address for your billing address.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| City                  | Required    | Type the name of the city for your billing address.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| State/Province/Region | Required    | Type or select the political subdivision in which your billing address exists. The label and field change depending on what you selected as your Country:If you select United States as your Country, this label changes to State. The field changes to a dropdown menu of U.S. states. You can also start typing the name of the state and then select it from the filtered list of states.If you select Canada as your Country, this label changes to Province. The field changes to a dropdown menu of Canadian provinces. You can also start typing the name of the province and then select it from the filtered list of provinces.If you select any other country as your Country, this label changes to State/Province/Region. The field changes to a text box. Type the name of your province, state, or region in this box. |
| ZIP or Postal Code    | Required    | Type the ZIP (U.S.) or Postal Code (other countries) for your billing address.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |

- Click the radio button for Credit Card or
  Paypal.

  - If you selected Credit Card, type values for the
    following fields:

    | Field                        | Necessity | Action                                                                                                                                     |
    | ---------------------------- | --------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
    | Name on Card                 | Required  | Type the name that appears on your credit card.                                                                                            |
    | Card Number                  | Required  | Type the 16-digit number that appears on your credit card. American Express uses a 15-digit number.                                        |
    | Expiration Date              | Required  | Type the expiration date for your credit card in the two-digit month and two-digit year format.                                            |
    | CVC (Card Verification Code) | Required  | Type the three-digit number on the back of your credit card. American Express uses a 4-digit number found on the front of the credit card. |

  - If you selected PayPal:

    - Click Pay with PayPal.

    - Complete the actions on the PayPal website.

All projects within your organization share the same billing
settings, including payment method.

- To accept your changes, click Submit.

- To decline your changes, click Cancel.

Once you update your credit card information and authenticate, you will
be automatically charged for all existing failed payments.

sections.heading: Failed Payment Email
sections.body:
Atlas sends an email after a payment failure with a link to your
invoices. Existing users can authenticate a credit card when retrying a
failed payment. To retry the failed payment from the failed payment
email:

Atlas displays a list of your invoices.
In this list, you can:

- Filter the invoices by status or date.

- View the invoice status.

- Click the link to view the invoice.

- Download each invoice as PDF or CSV.

Under the Payments section, click Retry
next to the failed payment.

sections.heading: Retry Failed Payment
sections.body:
Existing users can authenticate a credit card when retrying a failed
payment. To retry the failed payment from within Atlas:

In the Overview page, you can explore:

- Invoice information that includes a Pending Invoice section,
  which shows your Net Month-to-Date Amount for the current billing period. The
  net month-to-date amount reflects your net charges from the start of the period
  to the current day. You can also see a Last Invoice section,
  which shows your usage and amount due for the previous billing period.

- The [embedded data visualizations](billing-visualizations).

- The [subscription level](subscription-level) and
  [subscription level](subscription-level) sections.

View the payment method displayed in the Payment Method
card. If this method appears incorrect, click Edit in
that card.

You can filter the invoices by status and date.

- To filter by status, click the Status drop-down and
  select the status to which you want to limit the results:

  | Status     | Invoice Type                           |
  | ---------- | -------------------------------------- |
  | Pending    | Invoices still pending payment.        |
  | Free       | Invoices with a total charge of $0.00. |
  | Successful | Invoices that are paid.                |

- To filter by invoice date, set the From or
  To date inputs to the required date range.

  - If you leave From blank, Atlas sets the lower
    date boundary to the organization's creation date.

  - If you leave To blank, Atlas sets the upper date
    boundary to the current date.

To open a specific invoice, click its link in Invoice Date
or Invoice Period. The invoice page shows the following
sections:

| Invoice Section          | Contents                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Invoice header card      | The invoice amount due, the total cost of your usage for the billing period, and your billing information. In this card, you can export the invoice details to PDF or CSV. If you use credits, you can also see your total credit usage and the credit unit price.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Payment Details          | Payments that are itemized by the payment method. The table lists:Payment methods, which may include Atlas credits from a prepaid subscription or promotional subscription, a monthly commitment subscription, a marketplace subscription, a credit card, or PayPal.Date: the date when Atlas issued the charge.Payment status.Usage: the dollar or credit amount you have used.Billed Usage: the amount you are being billed for. Billed Usage amount can differ from the usage amount in a number of cases, such as when a month's usage is below the monthly minimum on your Atlas subscription, or a month's billed usage encompasses usage for multiple months.Total Cost: the unit price multiplied by billed usage, plus taxes. Taxes represent the amount of taxes collected by MongoDB. If you have a marketplace subscription, taxes are imposed by your Cloud Provider. To learn more, see Taxation by Region.Amount Due.Action that you can click. Actions can be one of the following:PDF: download the PDF of the tax invoice that you receive by email.VIEW DETAILS: view your subscription's monthly commitment details.PAY NOW: pay your bill directly if you are a YayPay customer.RETRY: retry the failed payment.To learn more, see Payment and Usage Details. |
| Total Usage chart        | The total usage by your Atlas usage over the billing period. You can filter usage by service. To learn more, see Invoice Charts.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| By Deployment chart      | The proportion of your usage incurred by each of your deployments for one or all projects. To learn more, see Invoice Charts.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Summary By Project table | A summarized list of usage costs per project, excluding subscription charges.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Summary by Service table | List of all Atlas services, App Services, MongoDB Charts, Atlas Embedding and Reranking API, and Atlas Subscription Plans with corresponding usage costs for each service, and the total usage amount. Atlas Embedding and Reranking API charges appear under AI Models.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Usage Details            | List of all line item details for each month's bill. This is a granular breakout of all services that are invoiced, including dates used and billed, quantity (the number of server hours), the project, the SKU rate, and the amount. You can download the usage details as a CSV. To learn more, see Payment and Usage Details.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |

- Locate the Payment Details section in your invoice page.

- Review the values in the Actions column to locate the
  Retry action.

- Click Retry.

Customers in the European Economic Area (EEA) may experience payment
failures due to Strong Customer Authentication (SCA), a European
regulatory requirement. To learn how to authenticate a credit card and
comply with SCA (Strong Customer Authentication), see
[Strong Customer Authentication (SCA) Changes](sca-changes).

sections.heading: Contact Support
sections.body: Contact support for further assistance.

sections.heading: International Currencies
sections.body:
To pay with Euros, make a request through the
[sales department](https://www.mongodb.com/company/contact?tck=docs).
